cmd:
mkdir -p factory/specs .agentic; printf '%s' '{"observability":{"enabled":true}}' > .agentic/config.json; printf -- '---
id: 001
title: t
status: building
claimed_by: build-loop
---
' > factory/specs/001-t.md; unset CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR AGENTIC_OBSERVE; "$PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/lib/tracker.sh" advance factory/specs/001-t.md blocked >/dev/null; cat .agentic/observability/events-*.jsonl | tail -1
